name: Through the Clouds — full pipeline (detect + validate)
description: End-to-end Borneo SAR deforestation run, automatable via run_recipe(id='ttc_full', zone=...). Detect (BUILD_CONTRACT §3.4-3.10, ADR-0001/0003) then validate (§4.4 gate, ADR-0005). The detect step execs the verified /app/ttc-config/detect.py. NOTE: the vendor run_recipe only substitutes $zone, so all inputs/thresholds are baked in and outputs go to the fixed /data/outputs/recipe_run/ (the TS client's `pipeline` command instead drives execute_python directly with a timestamped run_id).

zone.description: Geocodable canvas study zone (cosmetic; detection is file-driven).

steps.description: Canvas study zone over Central Kalimantan.

Despeckle (Lee 7x7) -> delta HV -> water/non-forest masks -> -2.5 dB threshold -> morphology -> MMU -> polygonize -> per-polygon attrs + Hansen cross-reference. Faithful port of src/ (validated: 54 alerts).
Apply the §4.4 demo gate to the detect step's metrics (ADR-0005 cross-reference; ADR-0007 ship caveated).
steps.code:
import json, os
mp = '/data/outputs/recipe_run/validation_metrics.json'
m = json.load(open(mp)) if os.path.exists(mp) else {}
gate = (m.get('users_accuracy', 0) >= 0.75 and m.get('producers_accuracy', 0) >= 0.65 and m.get('f1', 0) >= 0.70 and 0.2 <= m.get('alert_area_pct_of_aoi', 0) <= 8)
m['pipeline_passed'] = bool(gate)
m['needs_human_review'] = True
result['validation'] = m
result['pipeline_passed'] = bool(gate)
result['out_geojson'] = '/data/outputs/recipe_run/alerts_2023.geojson'
result['success'] = True
